events.event_description: The American Embassy was established at Karachi with Charles W. Lewis, Jr., as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, coinciding with the establishment of diplomatic relations.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on August 15, 1947, when the U.S. Department of State established the American Embassy at Karachi with Charles W. Lewis, Jr., as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
